strengths: Full-stack proficiency with 3+ years recent production experience in React, TypeScript, and Node.js; currently hands-on at re:cinq with same stack
AI agent development with MCP frameworks and agentic workflows; directly addresses rare required skill with current, active experience
Deep testing philosophy and code quality focus through library creation (fluent-asserts, Trial), TDD advocacy, and code kata leadership
concerns: Nest.js not mentioned despite being primary stack requirement; framework-specific experience unconfirmed
React depth unclear: experience exists but career narrative emphasizes backend systems; modern React patterns not demonstrated
Testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not mentioned; testing philosophy is strong but tool-specific experience unconfirmed

key_factors.factor: AI agent development with MCP expertise

response.justification: Candidate demonstrates strong full-stack fundamentals with sustained React, TypeScript, and Node.js production experience. AI agent development expertise (MCP/agentic workflows) uniquely addresses a required skill. However, primary stack requirements lack explicit confirmation: Nest.js, Jest, Vitest, and Playwright are not mentioned, creating ambiguity about framework-specific depth. Backend systems emphasis throughout the career raises questions about React proficiency depth for a truly full-stack role. Overall capable profile with notable strengths but requiring clarification on key technical requirements before proceeding.
